subject: Fw: Reliant -- Written Consent of Stockholders -- TIME SENSITIVE
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 22, 2007 8:37:57 AM
Subject: FW: Reliant -- Written Consent of Stockholders -- TIME SENSITIVE


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: Rowe, Marylou [mailto:mrowe@reliantrx.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, February 21, 2007 6:30 PM
To: Investor Relations
Cc: Sheares, Bradley; Ferguson, Robert; MICHAEL.PUCKER@lw.com
Subject: Reliant -- Written Consent of Stockholders -- TIME SENSITIVE


(sent on behalf of Robert Ferguson, CFO, Reliant Pharmaceuticals) 
CONFIDENTIAL 
Please review the attached documents and, if the Written Consent is acceptable, please execute the signature page and return it to Anna Jones by fax at 312-993-9767 or by e-mail to annachiara.jones@lw.com no later than 5:00pm CT on Monday, March 5, 2007.
Thank you. 
Bob 
************************************************** 
1.  Explanatory cover memo
2.  Written Consent of Stockholders (and Exhibits A through J thereto)
3.  Signature page to Written Consent of Stockholders
4.  Return fax cover sheet addressed to Anna Jones


 
 
Marylou Rowe
Investor Relations Manager
Reliant Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
tel 908 860 4646
mrowe@reliantrx.com


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
Get your own web address.  
Have a HUGE year through Yahoo! Small Business.
http://smallbusiness.yahoo.com/domains/?p=BESTDEAL
